grading_results.text: Recommends a specific backend (Ollama, llama.cpp, etc.)
grading_results.evidence: Explicitly recommends 'Ollama' as the easiest backend with excellent GPU acceleration support
Provides complete installation commands: nvidia-smi, nvcc --version, curl install.sh, ollama pull
Includes GPU Memory Optimization section with OLLAMA_GPU_LAYER_COUNT=35 for RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM
Lists DeepSeek Coder, Code Llama, StarCoder2 in 'Coding Assistance Configuration' section
